title: derris brachyptera
intro: Derris brachyptera, also known as Derris, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The leaves and roots of the Derris brachyptera plant possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain, swelling, and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its herbal uses, which can be taken orally or applied topically to the affected area.
